{"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-674", "name": "Uncontrolled Recursion"}], "description": "### Summary
StackOverflowException via nested array initializers bypasses ExpressionDepthLimit fix (GHSA-wgh7-7m3c-fx25)

### Details
The recent fix for GHSA-wgh7-7m3c-fx25 (uncontrolled recursion in parser) added `ExpressionDepthLimit` defaulting to 250. However, deeply nested **array initializers** (`[[[[...`) recurse through `ParseArrayInitializer` → `ParseExpression` → `ParseArrayInitializer`, which is a **different recursion path** not covered by the expression depth counter.

This causes a `StackOverflowException` on current main (commit b5ac4bf - "Add limits for default safety").

### PoC
```
using Scriban;

// ExpressionDepthLimit (default 250) does NOT prevent this crash
string nested = "{{ " + new string('[', 5000) + "1" + new string(']', 5000) + " }}";
Template.Parse(nested); // StackOverflowException - process terminates
```

### Impact
Same as GHSA-wgh7-7m3c-fx25: High severity. StackOverflowException cannot be caught with try/catch in .NET - the process terminates immediately. Any application calling Template.Parse with untrusted input is vulnerable, even with the new default ExpressionDepthLimit enabled.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-p6q4-fgr8-vx4p", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-24T22:06:24Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p6q4-fgr8-vx4p", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-p6q4-fgr8-vx4p"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-03-24T22:06:24Z", "references": ["https://github.com/scriban/scriban/security/advisories/GHSA-p6q4-fgr8-vx4p", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wgh7-7m3c-fx25", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p6q4-fgr8-vx4p"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/scriban/scriban/security-advisories/GHSA-p6q4-fgr8-vx4p", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/scriban/scriban", "summary": "Scriban has a Stack Overflow via Nested Array Initializers That Bypass the ExpressionDepthLimit Fix", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-06T13:07:27Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-p6q4-fgr8-vx4p", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "7.0.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "Scriban"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 7.0.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "7.0.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "Scriban.Signed"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 7.0.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Scriban has a Stack Overflow via Nested Array Initializers That Bypass the ExpressionDepthLimit Fix
